transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R_EA
transformation_chain.description:
PID Match Not Applicable
EA-Security 1.0 Rules
--EA 1.0 to EA 1.0
--Ala Carte to EA 1.0
--EA 1.0 to Ala Carte (Security)
--EA 1.0 to EA Choice (EA 2.0)

attributes.Sql Query:
--Ala Carte to EA 1.0 (attributed/standalone to standalone)

SELECT DISTINCT
TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      
,TRANS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,'RENEW' AS SALES_MOTION
,'EA-Security 1.0' AS REASON_CODE
,'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG
,CASE WHEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 THEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END AS RENEWAL_REF_ID
,CASE WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'ERP_OA_ID'
WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'POS_OA_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'ERP_ORDER_LINE_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'POS_TRANS_ID' 
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'XAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY' 
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0) THEN 'XAAS_OA_ID'
END AS RENEWAL_REF_CD
,'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - CAST(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE)  AS RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR TRANS
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT P
ON TRANS.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT AP
ON TRANS.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT=AP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN (SELECT WI.*,AP.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR   FROM 
(SELECT POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,cast(-9999 as integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,ORDER_PRODUCT_CD,END_CUSTOMER_HQ,SERVICE_FLG ,VALID_COVERAGE
,COVERAGE_ED ,ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME ,CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,1 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_POS_TRANS_HIST
WHERE VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
UNION
SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
B.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,ORDER_PRODUCT_CD,END_CUSTOMER_HQ,SERVICE_FLG
,VALID_COVERAGE,COVERAGE_ED, ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,2 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_ERP_TRANS_HIST A, $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE B
WHERE
VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND A.ORDER_LINE_ID=B.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
UNION
SELECT DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,ORDER_PRODUCT_CD,END_CUSTOMER_HQ,SERVICE_FLG
,VALID_COVERAGE,COVERAGE_ED, ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,3 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_XAAS_TRANS_HIST A,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT B
WHERE
A.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=B.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
) WI 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT P
ON WI.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT AP
ON WI.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT=AP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0 
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')
AND P.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ='SECURITY'  
AND P.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME NOT IN ('EA-Security 1.0','EA-Security 2.0','EA-Security Choice') 
) HL
ON TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ=HL.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
AND (TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME OR AP.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=HL.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR)
AND TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT<>HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANS_ID=TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=HL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM < TRANS.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
AND P.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ='SECURITY' 
AND P.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME='EA-Security 1.0' 
AND TRANS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE')
AND TRANS.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND (cast(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) ) <=90
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
ORDER BY HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ASC,ABS(RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS) ASC,HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM DESC,HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT DESC,HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT DESC)=1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R2BE
transformation_chain.description: Rule 2BE - BE level logic for Early Renewal,Add-on (+90 to -90)

attributes.Sql Query:
/* Identifying RENEW BUNDLE/STANDALONE SW LINES Previous = Bundle/Standalone Compare PID Matching*/

SELECT WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,'RENEW' AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,'INSIDE RENEWAL WINDOW' AS REASON_CODE
,'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG 
,RENEWAL_REF_ID
,RENEWAL_REF_CD
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,DIFF AS RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR   WI ,
$$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT BE,
(SELECT DISTINCT
TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.COVERAGE_SD
,CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) AS DIFF
,CASE WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'ERP_OA_ID'
WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'POS_OA_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'ERP_ORDER_LINE_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'POS_TRANS_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'XAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY' 
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0) THEN 'XAAS_OA_ID'  END AS RENEWAL_REF_ID
,CASE WHEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 THEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END AS RENEWAL_REF_CD
,CASE 
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 2
	WHEN TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 3
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 4
	WHEN TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 5
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.COVERAGE_SD = HL.COVERAGE_ED + INTERVAL '1' DAY THEN 6
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER THEN 7
	WHEN TRANS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = HL.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY THEN 8
	WHEN TRANS.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = HL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 9
	ELSE 10 
END AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR TRANS
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT BE
ON TRANS.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN (
SELECT 
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,1 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,WI.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER    
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY      
,WI.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY           
,WI.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
,WI.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY      
,cast(-9999 as integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_POS_TRANS_HIST WI
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.ORDER_LINE_ID AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,2 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,WI.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER            
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY      
,WI.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY           
,WI.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
,WI.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY      
,NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_ERP_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSO
ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSO.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,3 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,WI.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER            
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY      
,WI.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY           
,WI.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
,WI.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY      
,NR.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_XAAS_TRANS_HIST WI,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT NR
WHERE WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE') 
) HL
ON TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
AND TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ=HL.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
AND TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT<>HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANS_ID=TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=HL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM < TRANS.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
WHERE
TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME <> 'UNKNOWN'  
AND TRANS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ IS NOT NULL
AND TRANS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','OFFSET')
AND TRANS.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) BETWEEN -90 AND 90
AND BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR in ('Enterprise Switching','Computing Systems','Data Center Networking','Enterprise Routing','IOT','Monitoring and Analytics','Other','Security','Service Provider Routing','Wireless')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
ORDER BY  HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ASC,ABS(DIFF) ASC,RENEWAL_REF_RULE ASC,HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM DESC,HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT DESC,HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT DESC)=1
)PREV
WHERE
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=PREV.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=PREV.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND WI.COVERAGE_SD=PREV.COVERAGE_SD
AND WI.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND WI.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR in ('Enterprise Switching','Computing Systems','Data Center Networking','Enterprise Routing','IOT','Monitoring and Analytics','Other','Security','Service Provider Routing','Wireless')

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R1_INHT_1toM
transformation_chain.description: Rule 1 - Inheriting One to Many POS - SOL/SOL+PID Linkage

attributes.Sql Query:
/*Inheriting One to Many POS - SOL+PID Linkages*/

SELECT  
POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      
,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,SALES_MOTION_CD               
,REASON_CODE                   
,PROCESS_FLAG                  
,RENEWAL_REF_ID                
,RENEWAL_REF_CD                
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE              
,RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS              
,DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_SOLPID_POS_RULES_TAGS SW
WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR WI 
WHERE  WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=SW.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
and WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=SW.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND WI.PROCESS_FLAG='N')

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R7
transformation_chain.description: Rule 7 - Service component of SW inheritance from Bundle Line Sales Motion

attributes.Sql Query:
/*Service component of SW inheritance from Bundle Line Sales Motion*/

SELECT WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
PREV.SALES_MOTION_CD AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
PREV.REASON_CODE AS REASON_CODE,
'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG 
, RENEWAL_REF_ID
, RENEWAL_REF_CD
, RENEWAL_REF_RULE
, RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
from $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR WI ,
(SELECT DISTINCT
SM_TAG.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,SM_TAG.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,SM_TAG.SALES_MOTION_CD
,'SERVICE COMPONENT OF SW' AS REASON_CODE
,RENEWAL_REF_ID
,RENEWAL_REF_CD
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS SM_TAG 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR  WI_INCR
ON SM_TAG.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=WI_INCR.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND SM_TAG.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=WI_INCR.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
WHERE WI_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SM_TAG.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,SM_TAG.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,SM_TAG.SALES_MOTION_CD
ORDER BY CISCO_BOOKED_DTM DESC,SM_TAG.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT DESC,SM_TAG.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT DESC)=1
)PREV
WHERE
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=PREV.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG='Y'
AND WI.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND 1=2

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R5
transformation_chain.description: Rule 5 - Identifying RENEW STANDALONE SW LINES Previous = Bundle/Offset/Standalone/Attributed Compare PID Matching

attributes.Sql Query:
/*Identifying RENEW STANDALONE SW LINES Previous = Bundle/Offset/Standalone/Attributed Compare PID Matching*/

SELECT WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,'RENEW' AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,'INSIDE RENEWAL WINDOW' AS REASON_CODE
,'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG 
,RENEWAL_REF_ID
,RENEWAL_REF_CD
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,DIFF AS RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR   WI ,
(SELECT DISTINCT
TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.COVERAGE_SD
,CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD AS DATE) - CAST(HL.COVERAGE_ED AS DATE)   AS DIFF
,CASE WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'ERP_OA_ID'
WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'POS_OA_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'ERP_ORDER_LINE_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'POS_TRANS_ID' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'XAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0) THEN 'XAAS_OA_ID' END AS RENEWAL_REF_CD
,CASE WHEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 THEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END AS RENEWAL_REF_ID
,CASE 
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 2
	WHEN TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 3
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 4
	WHEN TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 5
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.COVERAGE_SD = HL.COVERAGE_ED + INTERVAL '1' DAY THEN 6
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER THEN 7
	WHEN TRANS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = HL.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY THEN 8
	WHEN TRANS.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = HL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 9
	ELSE 10 
END AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR TRANS
INNER JOIN  (
SELECT 
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,1 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,cast(-9999 as integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_POS_TRANS_HIST WI
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.ORDER_LINE_ID AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,2 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_ERP_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSO
ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSO.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,3 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY

WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
) HL
ON TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
AND TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ=HL.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
AND TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT<>HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANS_ID=TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=HL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM < TRANS.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
WHERE TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME <> 'UNKNOWN' 
AND TRANS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND TRANS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE')

ORDER BY HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ASC,ABS(DIFF) ASC,RENEWAL_REF_RULE ASC,HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM DESC,HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT DESC,HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT DESC)=1
)PREV

AND WI.PROCESS_FLAG='N'

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R3
transformation_chain.description:
Rule 3.1 - Identifying RENEW ATTRIBUTED SW LINES Previous = ATTRIBUTED OA (Attributed) PID Matching + Bundle PID Matching for current to previous
Rule 3.2 - Identifying RENEW ATTRIBUTED SW LINES Previous = Standalone OA (Attributed) PID Matching + Bundle PID Matching for current to previous

attributes.Sql Query:
/*  Identifying RENEW ATTRIBUTED SW LINES Previous = ATTRIBUTED OA (Attributed) PID Matching + Bundle PID Matching for current to previous */

SELECT WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,'RENEW' AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,'INSIDE RENEWAL WINDOW' AS REASON_CODE
,'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG 
,RENEWAL_REF_ID
,RENEWAL_REF_CD
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,DIFF AS RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR   WI  ,
(SELECT DISTINCT
TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.COVERAGE_SD
,CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE)  AS DIFF
,CASE WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'ERP_OA_ID'
WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'POS_OA_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'ERP_ORDER_LINE_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'POS_TRANS_ID' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'XAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0) THEN 'XAAS_OA_ID' END AS RENEWAL_REF_CD
,CASE WHEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 THEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END AS RENEWAL_REF_ID
,CASE 
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 2
	WHEN TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 3
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 4
	WHEN TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 5
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.COVERAGE_SD = HL.COVERAGE_ED + INTERVAL '1' DAY THEN 6
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER THEN 7
	WHEN TRANS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = HL.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY THEN 8
	WHEN TRANS.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = HL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 9
	ELSE 10 
END AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR TRANS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT P_TRANS
ON TRANS.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P_TRANS.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN (
SELECT 
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,1 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,P.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT  
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,cast(-9999 as integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_POS_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT P
ON WI.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P.BK_PRODUCT_ID
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.ORDER_LINE_ID AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,2 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,P.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT  
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_ERP_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSO
ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSO.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT P
ON WI.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P.BK_PRODUCT_ID
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,3 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,P.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT  
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,NR.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_XAAS_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT NR
ON WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT P
ON WI.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P.BK_PRODUCT_ID
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED')
) HL
ON
TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
AND P_TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING
AND TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ=HL.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
AND TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT<>HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANS_ID=TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=HL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM < TRANS.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
WHERE
TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME <> 'UNKNOWN' 
AND P_TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME <> 'UNKNOWN' 
AND HL.BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING <> 'UNKNOWN' 
AND TRANS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND TRANS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'
AND TRANS.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) BETWEEN 0 AND 90
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
ORDER BY HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ASC,ABS(DIFF) ASC,RENEWAL_REF_RULE ASC,HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM DESC,HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT DESC,HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT DESC)=1
)PREV
WHERE
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=PREV.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=PREV.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND WI.COVERAGE_SD=PREV.COVERAGE_SD
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND WI.PROCESS_FLAG='N'

attributes.Sql Query:
/*Identifying RENEW BUNDLE/STANDALONE SW LINES Previous = Bundle/Standalone Compare PID Matching*/

SELECT WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,'RENEW' AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,'INSIDE RENEWAL WINDOW' AS REASON_CODE
,'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG 
,RENEWAL_REF_ID
,RENEWAL_REF_CD
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,DIFF AS RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR   WI ,
(SELECT DISTINCT
TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.COVERAGE_SD
,CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) AS DIFF
,CASE WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'ERP_OA_ID'
WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'POS_OA_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'ERP_ORDER_LINE_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'POS_TRANS_ID' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'XAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0) THEN 'XAAS_OA_ID' END AS RENEWAL_REF_CD
,CASE WHEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 THEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END AS RENEWAL_REF_ID
,CASE 
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 2
	WHEN TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 3
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 4
	WHEN TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 5
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.COVERAGE_SD = HL.COVERAGE_ED + INTERVAL '1' DAY THEN 6
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER THEN 7
	WHEN TRANS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = HL.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY THEN 8
	WHEN TRANS.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = HL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 9
	ELSE 10 
END AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR TRANS
INNER JOIN (
SELECT 
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,1 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,cast(-9999 as integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
UNION

WI.ORDER_LINE_ID AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,2 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSO

WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,3 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,NR.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_XAAS_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT NR
ON WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
) HL
ON
TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
AND TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ=HL.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
AND TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT<>HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANS_ID=TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=HL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM < TRANS.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
WHERE
TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME <> 'UNKNOWN'

)PREV
WHERE
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=PREV.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT

AND WI.COVERAGE_SD=PREV.COVERAGE_SD
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG='N'

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R2BE_NL
transformation_chain.description: Rule 2BE_NL - BE level logic for Early Renewal,Add-on (+90 to No-limit )

attributes.Sql Query:
/* Identifying RENEW BUNDLE/STANDALONE SW LINES Previous = Bundle/Standalone Compare PID Matching*/

SELECT WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,'RENEW' AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,'INSIDE RENEWAL WINDOW' AS REASON_CODE
,'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG 
,RENEWAL_REF_ID
,RENEWAL_REF_CD
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,DIFF AS RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR   WI ,
$$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT BE,
(SELECT DISTINCT
TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,TRANS.COVERAGE_SD
,CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) AS DIFF
,CASE WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'ERP_OA_ID'
WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'POS_OA_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'ERP_ORDER_LINE_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'POS_TRANS_ID' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'XAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY' 
 WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0) THEN 'XAAS_OA_ID' END AS RENEWAL_REF_CD
,CASE WHEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 THEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END AS RENEWAL_REF_ID
,CASE 
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 2
	WHEN TRANS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 3
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 4
	WHEN TRANS.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY=HL.LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  THEN 5
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER AND TRANS.COVERAGE_SD = HL.COVERAGE_ED + INTERVAL '1' DAY THEN 6
	WHEN TRANS.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER = HL.DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER THEN 7
	WHEN TRANS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = HL.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY THEN 8
	WHEN TRANS.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = HL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 9
	ELSE 10 
END AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR TRANS
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT BE
ON TRANS.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN (
SELECT 
WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,1 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,cast(-9999 as integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_POS_TRANS_HIST WI
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.ORDER_LINE_ID AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,2 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_ERP_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSO
ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSO.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
UNION
SELECT 
WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,WI.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,3 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WI.COVERAGE_SD
,WI.COVERAGE_ED
,NULL AS BUNDLE_PID_MAPPING 
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT 
,DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
,CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,WI.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
,LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY
,NR.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_XAAS_TRANS_HIST WI
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT NR
ON WI.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME<>'UNKNOWN' AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','STANDALONE')
)HL
ON TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
AND TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ=HL.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
AND TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT<>HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANS_ID=TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=HL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM < TRANS.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
WHERE TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME <> 'UNKNOWN' 
AND TRANS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ IS NOT NULL
AND TRANS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','OFFSET')
AND TRANS.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR in ('Collaboration','Meraki')
AND CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) <=90
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
ORDER BY HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ASC,ABS(DIFF) ASC,RENEWAL_REF_RULE ASC,HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM DESC,HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT DESC,HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT DESC)=1
)PREV
WHERE WI.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=PREV.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND WI.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=PREV.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND WI.COVERAGE_SD=PREV.COVERAGE_SD
AND WI.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND WI.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR in ('Collaboration','Meraki')

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SW_POS_RULES_TAGS_R_WPA
transformation_chain.description:
WPARules
--WPA to WPA
--Ala Carte/EA 1.0/EA Choice to WPA

attributes.Sql Query:
--WPA to WPA (attributed/standalone to standalone)

SELECT DISTINCT
TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      
,TRANS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,'RENEW' AS SALES_MOTION
,'WPA' AS REASON_CODE
,'Y' AS PROCESS_FLAG
,CASE WHEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 THEN HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END AS RENEWAL_REF_ID
,CASE WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'ERP_OA_ID'
WHEN ( HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) THEN 'POS_OA_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'ERP_ORDER_LINE_ID'
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 1 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'POS_TRANS_ID' 
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0) THEN 'XAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY' 
WHEN (HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 3 AND HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0) THEN 'XAAS_OA_ID'
END AS RENEWAL_REF_CD
,'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
,CAST(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - CAST(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE)  AS RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR TRANS
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT P
ON TRANS.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT AP
ON TRANS.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT=AP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN (SELECT WI.*,AP.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,AP.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR FROM 
(SELECT POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,cast(-9999 as integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,ORDER_PRODUCT_CD,END_CUSTOMER_HQ,SERVICE_FLG ,VALID_COVERAGE
,COVERAGE_ED ,ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME ,CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,1 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_POS_TRANS_HIST
WHERE VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
UNION
SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
B.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,ORDER_PRODUCT_CD,END_CUSTOMER_HQ,SERVICE_FLG
,VALID_COVERAGE,COVERAGE_ED, ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,2 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_ERP_TRANS_HIST A, $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE B
WHERE
VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND A.ORDER_LINE_ID=B.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
UNION
SELECT DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,ORDER_PRODUCT_CD,END_CUSTOMER_HQ,SERVICE_FLG
,VALID_COVERAGE,COVERAGE_ED, ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,3 AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_BKGS_XAAS_TRANS_HIST A,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT B
WHERE
A.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=B.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
) WI 
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT P
ON WI.ORDER_PRODUCT_CD=P.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SW_POS_BE_HIER_PRDT AP
ON WI.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT=AP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
WHERE WI.VALID_COVERAGE='Y'
AND WI.END_CUSTOMER_HQ> 0 
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')
AND P.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ='WPA'  
) HL
ON TRANS.END_CUSTOMER_HQ=HL.END_CUSTOMER_HQ
AND P.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=HL.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND (TRANS.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME=HL.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME  OR AP.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=HL.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR)
AND TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT<>HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANS_ID=TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=HL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM < TRANS.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
AND P.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ='WPA'
AND TRANS.PROCESS_FLAG='N'
AND TRANS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE')
AND (cast(TRANS.COVERAGE_SD as DATE) - cast(HL.COVERAGE_ED as DATE) ) <=90
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRANS.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,TRANS.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
ORDER BY HL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ASC,ABS(RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS) ASC,HL.CISCO_BOOKED_DTM DESC,HL.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT DESC,HL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT DESC)=1
